title: Backend Engineer/API, Payments and Risk
score_reasoning: Your 7 years of distributed systems and backend engineering experience align strongly with Stripe's payments infrastructure focus. Your billing engine work at Stackflo (€2M/month processing, Go, Postgres-backed job queues) is directly transferable to this payments and risk role. The tech stack (APIs, large-scale systems, cloud services, Docker/Kubernetes) matches your core strengths, though Kubernetes remains a gap. The 2–12+ years range positions you solidly as a strong mid-to-senior candidate. Dublin is within your acceptable European regions and timezone (+0 to +1h from Berlin), making this role remote-compatible if not explicitly restricted. The role's emphasis on building ergonomic APIs and managing money at scale aligns with your career direction toward high-scale distributed systems.

red_flags: Location listing 'Dublin, Ireland' without explicit remote statement—assumed on-site or hybrid in office, not fully remote
Kubernetes preferred but you have only basic Docker experience
No specific mention of Python/Go preference; language-agnostic interview may favor other stacks
